    VALUES(dim_pays_star_fr[iso3]),
    VAR pop =
        CALCULATE(MAX(fact_dashboard_star_fr[population_totale]))
    VAR deces =
        CALCULATE(
            SUM(fact_dashboard_star_fr[deces_wash]),
            KEEPFILTERS(fact_dashboard_star_fr[annee] = 2016)
        )
    VAR okPop =
        SWITCH(
            codePop,
            0, TRUE(),
            1, NOT ISBLANK(pop) && pop > 500000,
            2, NOT ISBLANK(pop) && pop <= 500000,
            9, ISBLANK(pop),
            TRUE()
        )
    RETURN IF(okPop, COALESCE(deces, 0), 0)
)

VAR choix =
    SELECTEDVALUE(
        'Filtre_stabilité_politique'[Option],
        "Inclure les pays instables"
    )
VAR seuil = [Seuil stabilité]   
VAR Base =
    CALCULATETABLE(
        SUMMARIZE(
            fact_dashboard_star_fr,
            fact_dashboard_star_fr[pays],
            fact_dashboard_star_fr[annee],
            "stb", MAX(fact_dashboard_star_fr[stabilite_politique])
        ),
        NOT ( fact_dashboard_star_fr[iso3] IN { "HKG", "MAC", "TWN" } ),
        fact_dashboard_star_fr[iso3] <> "CHN"
    )
VAR BaseFiltree =
    FILTER(
        Base,
        choix <> "Exclure les pays instables" || [stb] >= seuil
    )

RETURN 
  IF(
        ISEMPTY(BaseFiltree),
        BLANK(),
        AVERAGEX(BaseFiltree, [stb])
    )

VAR AnneesUniques = DISTINCT(dim_annee_star_fr[annee])  
VAR AnneeDebut = MINX(AnneesUniques, [annee])           
VAR AnneeFin = MAXX(AnneesUniques, [annee])             
VAR MortaliteDebut =
    CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE(Fact_KPI_Monde[mortalite_wash_pour_100k]),
        fact_dashboard_star_fr[annee] = AnneeDebut
    )
VAR MortaliteFin =
    CALCULATE(
        AVERAGE(Fact_KPI_Monde[mortalite_wash_pour_100k]),
        fact_dashboard_star_fr[annee] = AnneeFin
    )
VAR NbAnnees = AnneeFin - AnneeDebut
RETURN
    DIVIDE(
        (MortaliteFin - MortaliteDebut),
        MortaliteDebut * NbAnnees,
        BLANK()
    )

VAR v = [Accès eau potable % moyen]
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    ISBLANK(v), "#EAF6FD",

    -- Zone alerte (non-vertes)
    v < 50, "#B10026",   -- alerte forte
    v < 65, "#FC4E2A",   -- alerte modérée
    v < 75, "#FEB24C",   -- vigilance

    -- Zone bonne (remplace les verts par palette bleue)
    v < 85, "#8CCCED",   -- bleu clair
    v < 92, "#2F9AD6",   -- bleu principal

)

                ALLSELECTED ( dim_annee_star_fr[annee] ),
                NOT ISBLANK (
                    CALCULATE (
                        AVERAGE ( fact_dashboard_star_fr[service_safely_managed_pct] ),
                        dim_action_star_fr[action_prioritaire] <> "Non classe"
                    )
                )
            ),
            dim_annee_star_fr[annee]
        )
    RETURN
        CALCULATE (
            AVERAGE ( fact_dashboard_star_fr[service_safely_managed_pct] ),
            dim_annee_star_fr[annee] = AnneeRefDisponible,
            dim_action_star_fr[action_prioritaire] <> "Non classe"
        ),
    0
)
